conditions.critical_condition_basis: Solvent composition (butanone/cyclohexane mixture) leading to elution independent of molar mass
conditions.evidence_text: If the composition of the two solvents is 92/8 vol %, these conditions are obtained for a temperature of 29 C. In this case all 1,4-PI samples elute at the same retention volume irrespective of their molar masses.
conditions.notes: Samples contain ~94 mol% 1,4-PI and ~6 mol% 3,4-PI. Critical conditions established for the 1,4-isoprene moiety.
